name: context-bharat
description: AI-ready documentation for India's developer ecosystem

scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names 'backend,mcp,frontend,worker' --prefix-colors 'yellow,blue,green,magenta' 'make dev-backend' 'pnpm --filter mcp-server dev' 'pnpm --filter frontend dev' 'make dev-worker'
scripts.build: pnpm --filter mcp-server build && pnpm --filter frontend build
